phase1_subscription_caps.quota_guard_note: Commander checks for recent rate-limit errors before spawning. If hit, pauses automatically for 1 hour.

phase2_api_caps._note: Ignored in Phase 1 (subscription). Active when commander moves to VM + Anthropic API.

notes: Phase 1 (Claude Code subscription): cost is flat; real constraints are rate-limit quota, wall-clock, and concurrency. Phase 2 (Anthropic API on VM): $ caps re-activate.
